message:
style(persist): rustfmt + clippy-vec-init sweep

Mechanical cleanups in fr-persist. No behavior change.

crates/fr-persist/src/lib.rs
  * Test-module assertion formatting broken across lines per the
    workspace rustfmt config — the `assert_eq!(encoded, golden,
    "message")` calls that previously fit on one line now use the
    canonical multi-line form.
  * `let golden = b"..."` literals for the multi-command AOF and
    RDB header cases wrapped so the byte-string stays on its own
    line and the assertion is still grep-able.

crates/fr-persist/examples/generate_fuzz_corpus.rs
  * Import reordered: `{encode_aof_stream, encode_rdb, AofRecord,
    RdbEntry, RdbValue}` → `{AofRecord, RdbEntry, RdbValue,
    encode_aof_stream, encode_rdb}` to match the workspace "types
    before functions" sort.
  * The three `Vec::new()` + `push(...)` + `push(...)` sequences
    building the list/hash/dump seed payloads collapsed into a
    single `vec![...]` initializer, matching clippy::vec_init_then_push.
  * No payload bytes changed — the generated corpus files are
    identical byte-for-byte.

`git diff -w` across the src/ half is empty; the examples half
changes are semantically equivalent per clippy::vec_init_then_push.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
